label: Content Warnings
description: Flags for content that may be distressing or inappropriate for certain readers, based on what the work depicts.

tags.definition: Sustained depiction of psychological or emotional abuse between characters
Sustained depiction of physical abuse, battery, or bodily harm between characters
Depiction of sexual abuse or molestation
Depiction of addiction, substance dependency, or significant drug/alcohol misuse
Depiction of cruelty to, torture of, or graphic death of animals
Death of a child depicted on or near the page
Depiction of violence within intimate or family relationships
Depiction of disordered eating, anorexia, bulimia, or related conditions
Detailed, explicit depictions of physical violence, gore, or bodily harm
Significant depiction of anti-LGBTQ+ discrimination, slurs, or violence
Significant depiction of racism, racial violence, or use of racial slurs
Depiction of self-inflicted injury or self-destructive behavior
Depiction of rape or sexual assault
Depiction of chattel slavery and its conditions
Depiction of suicide or suicide attempts
Depiction of deliberate infliction of severe pain or suffering
Graphic depiction of combat, casualties, or atrocities of war
